patch.value: LOC growth watch: 5 src files back over 2000 lines (cap 3400) after 2026-05-25 barrel splits

All src files were brought under 2000 LOC on 2026-05-25 (pm-mbdu); five have regrown past it: src/core/extensions/loader.ts 2504, src/cli/main.ts 2428, src/sdk/cli-contracts.ts 2231, src/cli/commands/completion.ts 2214, src/cli/commands/update.ts 2060. All still pass the 3400 static-gate cap, but loader.ts (+500 since split) and main.ts are trending fastest. Concrete splits: loader.ts -> move manifest/catalog parsing + capability normalization into src/core/extensions/ siblings (extension-types.ts pattern); main.ts -> extract the global-flag extraction/normalization block (extractCommandScopedOptions and friends) into src/cli/global-options.ts; cli-contracts.ts -> continue the existing src/sdk/cli-contracts/ directory split (tool-parameter-tables.ts already lives there); completion.ts -> separate zsh/fish hand-maintained generators from the bash auto-generator. update.ts is already covered by the open runUpdate table-driven refactor item -- do that one there, not here.
